The '''''Selander''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] operated by the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]].

During a battle in the [[Sepan Civil War]], the ''Selander'', along with its sister ship, the ''[[Galliot]]'', [[Battle of Science Station Youst|attacked]] the [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] [[XQ1 Platform]] [[Science Station Youst]].

[[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], in a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bomber]] launched from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]'s flagship, the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']], carried out a warhead attack in defense of the Dimok platform that drove off the Ripoblus reprisal.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
